mentions.note: CPG with 8%+ yield (among highest in group); RFK Jr. opposition to junk food and GLP-1 drugs pose headwinds; Cramer argues stasis unworkable, yield could rise to 9% if no action taken; breakup needed.
Tough. Food category challenges severe. Won't buy on yield alone despite big yield. David (New York) caller; Cramer avoids.
Down considerably; packaged food company vulnerable to inflation; food sector weakness broad.
